changes: Initial release of StewardSync.
Driver incident reporting flow with event and race context.
Steward review queue and review submission workflow.
Finalization tools for head stewards and event managers.
Role-based access control across dashboards and admin screens.
Changelog
Filter reports list based on a driver's active series'
Rough mobile support
Add 'Finalized By' to report detail view
Fix finalzation not working on submit
Add report information to finalization form
Remove form field overrides
New: UI changes for review and report interfaces
Add auditing to more editing flows for reports/reviews
Fix time penalty display bug with driver dashboard's individual penalties
Create My Reviews tab
Fix editing of reviews trying to create a new review
Add video link to the report form
Fix driver individual penalties to use at-fault driver instead of reported driver
Fix: Restore reportingCloseDuration validation for driver report submissions
